messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Supply Chain Optimization' for our logistics operations team. The deck needs 16 slides following an industrial theme with grey backgrounds and orange highlights. Use English for the content and set the slide size to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the final file as supply_chain_opt.pptx. Do not use external APIs or web scraping. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart when adding charts. Additionally, you must check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text on the title shape. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BG_COLOR = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0x34, 0x49, 0x5E)
ACCENT = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_TEXT = RGBColor(0xB0, 0xBC, 0xC5)
DARK_BG = RGBColor(0x1A, 0x25, 0x2F)
MID_GREY = RGBColor(0x45, 0x5A, 0x64)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name or FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=CARD_BG, accent_color=ACCENT):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x54, 0x6E, 0x7A)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.08), height - Inches(0.2))
    accent_bar.fill.solid()
    accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.7), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.9), body, font_size=12, color=LIGHT_TEXT)


def add_section_label(slide, text, x, y):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    add_text_box(slide, x, y, Inches(12), Inches(0.4), text, font_size=28, bold=True, color=WHITE)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=10, color=LIGHT_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_BG
        shape.line.color.rgb = MID_GREY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)


def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(3.0), ACCENT)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(11), Inches(1.2), "Supply Chain Optimization", font_size=44, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Strategic Solutions for Modern Logistics Operations", font_size=22, color=LIGHT_TEXT)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.4), "Prepared for Logistics Operations Team", font_size=16, color=LIGHT_TEXT)
    add_footer(slide, 1, 16)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Agenda", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), ACCENT)

    items = [
        ("01", "Supply Chain Overview"),
        ("02", "Current Challenges"),
        ("03", "Technology Integration"),
        ("04", "Warehouse Automation"),
        ("05", "Demand Forecasting"),
        ("06", "Supplier Relationship Management"),
        ("07", "Risk Mitigation Strategies"),
        ("08", "KPIs & Metrics Dashboard"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(items):
        y = Inches(1.5 + i * 0.65)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4), num, font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=18, color=WHITE)

    items_2 = [
        ("09", "Case Study: Global Manufacturer"),
        ("10", "Implementation Roadmap"),
        ("11", "ROI Analysis"),
        ("12", "Best Practices"),
        ("13", "Future Trends"),
        ("14", "Thank You & Q&A"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(items_2):
        y = Inches(5.0 + i * 0.65)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.0), y, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4), num, font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.4), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=18, color=WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 16)


def build_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Supply Chain Overview", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "A supply chain encompasses the entire flow of goods and services — from raw material sourcing to final delivery to the end customer.", font_size=16, color=LIGHT_TEXT)

    components = [
        ("Sourcing", "Procurement of raw materials\nand supplier management"),
        ("Manufacturing", "Production planning and quality control"),
        ("Distribution", "Warehousing and logistics networks"),
        ("Retail", "Last-mile delivery to customers"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(components):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.1)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(4.0), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 16)


def build_challenges_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Current Challenges", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    challenges = [
        ("Inventory Management", "Excess stock ties up capital while shortages lead to lost sales and customer dissatisfaction."),
        ("Transportation Costs", "Fuel price volatility and carrier capacity constraints drive unpredictable logistics expenses."),
        ("Demand Volatility", "Seasonal fluctuations and market shifts make accurate forecasting increasingly difficult."),
        ("Supplier Reliability", "Geopolitical disruptions and single-source dependencies create operational vulnerabilities."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(challenges):
        x = Inches(0.8 + (i % 2) * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + (i // 2) * 2.9)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.6), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 16)


def build_technology_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Technology Integration", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    technologies = [
        ("IoT Sensors", "Real-time tracking of goods, temperature monitoring, and predictive maintenance across the supply chain."),
        ("AI & Machine Learning", "Demand forecasting, route optimization, and automated decision-making for inventory replenishment."),
        ("Blockchain", "Immutable transaction records, enhanced traceability, and smart contracts for supplier payments."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(technologies):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 4.1)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.9), Inches(5.0), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 16)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Warehouse Automation", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    items = [
        ("Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs)", "Autonomous transport of materials within warehouse facilities"),
        ("Robotic Picking Systems", "High-speed sorting and order fulfillment with 99% accuracy"),
        ("Warehouse Management System (WMS)", "Centralized inventory tracking and space optimization"),
        ("Conveyor & Sortation Networks", "Continuous flow processing for high-volume distribution centers"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(items):
        x = Inches(0.8 + (i % 2) * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + (i // 2) * 2.9)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.6), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 16)


def build_forecasting_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Demand Forecasting", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Leveraging predictive analytics and machine learning to anticipate market demand with greater accuracy.", font_size=16, color=LIGHT_TEXT)

    methods = [
        ("Time Series Analysis", "Historical data patterns for seasonal and trend-based predictions"),

        ("Collaborative Planning", "Shared forecasts between suppliers, manufacturers, and retailers"),
        ("Scenario Modeling", "What-if analysis for disruption preparedness and capacity planning"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(methods):
        x = Inches(0.8 + (i % 2) * 6.3)
        y = Inches(2.5 + (i // 2) * 2.4)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.1), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 7, 16)

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title

    strategies = [

        ("Safety Stock Optimization", "Dynamic buffer levels based on demand variability and lead times"),
        ("Contingency Planning", "Pre-defined response protocols for supply disruptions"),

    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(strategies):

        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.6), title, body)

def build_kpi_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "KPIs & Metrics Dashboard", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    kpis = [
        ("Inventory Turnover Ratio", "Measures how efficiently inventory is managed and sold"),
        ("On-Time In-Full (OTIF)", "Percentage of orders delivered complete and on schedule"),
        ("Order Cycle Time", "Average time from order placement to customer delivery"),
        ("Perfect Order Rate", "Orders fulfilled without errors, damage, or delays"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = Inches(0.8 + (i % 2) * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + (i // 2) * 2.9)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.6), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 10, 16)


def build_case_study_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Case Study: Global Manufacturer", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Before and After Supply Chain Transformation", font_size=18, color=LIGHT_TEXT)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Inventory\nTurnover", "OTIF\nRate (%)", "Order\nCycle (days)", "Cost per\nUnit ($)"]
    chart_data.add_series("Before", (4.2, 85, 12, 28))
    chart_data.add_series("After", (7.8, 96, 7, 22))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.8), Inches(2.3), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data,
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    for i in range(len(chart.series)):
        series = chart.series[i]
        if i == 0:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = MID_GREY
        else:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.4), "Key Results", font_size=22, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    results = [
        ("Inventory Turnover:", "+86% improvement"),
        ("OTIF Rate:", "+11 percentage points"),
        ("Order Cycle Time:", "-42% reduction"),
        ("Cost per Unit:", "-21% savings"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(results):
        y = Inches(2.0 + i * 0.75)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), y, Inches(3.0), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.8), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4), value, font_size=14, color=ACCENT)

    add_footer(slide, 11, 16)


def build_roadmap_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Implementation Roadmap", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    phases = [
        ("Q1 2024 — Assessment", "Current state analysis and gap identification"),
        ("Q2 2024 — Planning", "Technology selection and vendor onboarding"),
        ("Q3 2024 — Pilot Launch", "Warehouse automation in primary distribution center"),
        ("Q4 2024 — Full Deployment", "Enterprise-wide rollout and team training"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(phases):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.15)
        y = Inches(1.6)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.9), Inches(4.5), title, body)

    connector_y = Inches(3.8)
    for i in range(3):
        x_start = Inches(0.8 + (i + 1) * 3.15 - 0.25)
        line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x_start, connector_y, Inches(0.4), Inches(0.1))
        line.fill.solid()
        line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.3), Inches(11), Inches(0.5), "Estimated Total Investment: $2.4M | Expected Payback Period: 18 months", font_size=14, color=LIGHT_TEXT)
    add_footer(slide, 12, 16)


def build_roi_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "ROI Analysis", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Inventory\nReduction", "Labor\nEfficiency", "Transportation\nSavings", "Quality\nImprovement"]
    chart_data.add_series("Annual Savings ($M)", (1.8, 2.4, 3.1, 1.5))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(5.5), Inches(5.0),
        chart_data,
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.4), "Financial Summary", font_size=22, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    summary_items = [
        ("Total Annual Savings:", "$8.8M"),
        ("Implementation Cost:", "$2.4M"),
        ("Net Year 1 Return:", "$6.4M"),
        ("ROI (Year 1):", "267%"),
        ("Payback Period:", "3.4 months"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(summary_items):
        y = Inches(2.0 + i * 0.85)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(10.2), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4), value, font_size=16, bold=True, color=ACCENT)

    add_footer(slide, 13, 16)


def build_best_practices_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Best Practices", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    practices = [
        ("Data-Driven Decisions", "Base all supply chain decisions on real-time analytics and KPI dashboards"),
        ("Cross-Functional Alignment", "Ensure procurement, operations, and sales teams share unified goals"),
        ("Continuous Improvement", "Adopt Lean Six Sigma methodologies for ongoing process optimization"),
        ("Customer-Centric Design", "Structure the supply chain around end-customer experience priorities"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(practices):
        x = Inches(0.8 + (i % 2) * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + (i // 2) * 2.9)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.6), title, body)

    practices_2 = [
        ("Agile Response", "Build flexibility into the supply chain to adapt to market changes"),
        ("Sustainability Focus", "Integrate environmental and social governance into sourcing decisions"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(practices_2):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 6.3)
        y = Inches(5.4)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(1.7), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 14, 16)


def build_trends_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Future Trends", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), ACCENT)

    trends = [
        ("Digital Twin Technology", "Virtual replicas of physical supply chains for simulation and optimization"),
        ("Autonomous Vehicles", "Self-driving trucks and drones transforming last-mile delivery"),
        ("Circular Supply Chains", "Closed-loop systems prioritizing reuse, recycling, and waste reduction"),
        ("Edge Computing", "Real-time data processing at the source for faster decision-making"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(trends):
        x = Inches(0.8 + (i % 2) * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + (i // 2) * 2.9)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.6), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 15, 16)


def build_thankyou_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(4.3), ACCENT)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(11), Inches(1.2), "Thank You", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(11), Inches(0.6), "Questions & Discussion", font_size=24, color=LIGHT_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.3), ACCENT)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(11), Inches(0.4), "Logistics Operations Team", font_size=18, color=LIGHT_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 16, 16)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_overview_slide(prs)
    build_challenges_slide(prs)
    build_technology_slide(prs)
    build_warehouse_slide(prs)
    build_forecasting_slide(prs)
    build_supplier_slide(prs)
    build_risk_slide(prs)
    build_kpi_slide(prs)
    build_case_study_slide(prs)
    build_roadmap_slide(prs)
    build_roi_slide(prs)
    build_best_practices_slide(prs)
    build_trends_slide(prs)
    build_thankyou_slide(prs)

    prs.save("supply_chain_opt.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
